summary.intent: Integrate the Entire CLI checkpoint system as a new data source for the Gossamer project: index checkpoint files into SQLite, expose them via REST API, and display them in the React Native UI with rich summary data.
summary.outcome: Fully implemented end-to-end: a checkpoint indexer (src/indexer.ts) that parses full.jsonl and metadata.json into 5 normalized Prisma models, REST API routes including a many-to-many session→checkpoints lookup, and two new UI screens (Checkpoints list + CheckpointDetail) with collapsible summary cards. 2,400 messages across 12 checkpoints indexed; CheckpointSessionLink populated via re-index.

repo: Gossamer uses Prisma 7 + better-sqlite3 adapter (PrismaBetterSqlite3) with NodeNext module resolution requiring .js extensions on imports.
The Express API server and WebSocket server share port 3000; restart requires `lsof -ti :3000 | xargs kill -9` before relaunching.
Entire CLI checkpoint shard tree layout: <root>/<2hex>/<10hex>/ with root metadata.json and session subdirs 0/, 1/, each containing metadata.json + full.jsonl.

full.jsonl event types are 'user', 'assistant', 'progress', 'file-history-snapshot', 'system' with fields uuid, parentUuid, sessionId, timestamp, cwd, gitBranch, slug, version, planContent, toolUseID, parentToolUseID, message/data.
Session metadata.json summary shape: { intent, outcome, learnings: { repo[], code[{path,finding}], workflow[] }, friction[], open_items[] } — present only in newer Entire CLI versions.
The app uses React Navigation stack; new screens require entries in both RootStackParamList type and Stack.Navigator in App.tsx.
AI summarization for InteractionOverview uses claude-haiku-4-5 via Anthropic SDK, called non-blockingly on Stop events.

code.finding: Uses findUnique + conditional create instead of upsert for CheckpointMessage to avoid unexpected upsert behavior on uuid-keyed records.

indexCheckpoint upsert order matters: Checkpoint → CheckpointSession → CheckpointSessionLink → CheckpointSummary → CheckpointMessage. Re-indexing skips existing UUIDs but always re-upserts session/summary records to pick up new fields.

GFM table detection requires isTableStart(j) guard in the paragraph accumulator — using !line.includes('|') breaks paragraphs containing pipe characters. Separator row regex: /^\|?[\s|:=-]*-+[\s|:=-]*\|?$/.
splitHeader() uses HEADER_MIN=75, HEADER_MAX=120 character thresholds to split card content into a collapsible header/body for user and assistant events.

CheckpointSession.sessionId is @unique (canonical latest-state record per session), so many-to-many history is tracked via a separate CheckpointSessionLink table with @@unique([checkpointId, sessionId]) and @@index([sessionId]).
mapSummary() helper normalizes CheckpointSummary DB records (JSON string fields) into typed arrays for API responses across all checkpoint endpoints.

workflow: Use `git worktree add /tmp/entire-checkpoints entire/checkpoints/v1` to access files from a branch without switching; remove with `git worktree remove` after indexing.

When re-indexing after schema changes, existing CheckpointMessage UUIDs are skipped but CheckpointSession and CheckpointSummary records are upserted — allows backfilling new fields without duplicating messages.
User explicitly rejected storing nested JSON as a blob field on CheckpointSession; always prefer normalized relational tables for structured nested data (CheckpointSummary pattern).
Prisma schema edits can fail if old_string doesn't match due to prior modifications in the same session — always re-read the file before editing.

friction: CheckpointSession.sessionId being @unique prevented tracking the same session across multiple checkpoints, requiring a retroactive CheckpointSessionLink junction table.
User rejected the initial JSON blob approach for summary fields; required rework to a normalized CheckpointSummary relation table.
Port 3000 EADDRINUSE on server restart required manual kill before relaunching.
Prisma schema Edit tool calls failed when old_string didn't match due to prior in-session edits; required re-reading the file first.
GFM table fix initially broke paragraphs containing pipe characters — the isTableStart() guard needed a lookahead for a separator row rather than a simple pipe check.
The entire/checkpoints/v1 branch data is only accessible via git worktree (not a live API), requiring a temporary checkout for each index run.
open_items: No UI built yet for GET /api/sessions/:sessionId/checkpoints — the route is live but there is no screen that surfaces 'which checkpoints was this session part of' from within SessionDetail.
CheckpointTranscriptStart and transcriptLinesAtStart fields on CheckpointSession are always null in current data (version-dependent field not present in local checkpoints).
Only 3 of 4 CheckpointSessions have summaries — one session's metadata.json lacks a summary field; no fallback or alert when summary is absent.
The indexer must be re-run manually via git worktree each time new checkpoints are created; no automated watch/polling mechanism exists yet.
InteractionOverview backfill and checkpoint indexing are separate pipelines with no unified re-index command.
